plugin.name: Weekly Review Dashboard
plugin.description: A beautiful dashboard for reviewing your projects and areas on a schedule.
plugin.author: asktru

plugin.settings.title: Project/Area Tags
plugin.settings.description: Comma-separated list of tags to identify projects and areas.

plugin.settings.title: Folders to Exclude
plugin.settings.description: Comma-separated list of folder names to exclude from scanning.

plugin.settings.title: Append Completion Date
plugin.settings.description: When completing tasks, append @done(date time) to match NotePlan's 'Append Completion Date' setting.

plugin.settings.title: Review Mention
plugin.settings.description: The mention string used for review interval.

plugin.settings.title: Reviewed Mention
plugin.settings.description: The mention string used for last reviewed date.

plugin.commands.name: Mark as Reviewed
plugin.commands.description: Mark the current note as reviewed today

plugin.commands.name: Turn into project
plugin.commands.description: Set the current note as a project with frontmatter-based review tracking. Migrates existing hashtag and mention syntax to frontmatter.

plugin.commands.name: Turn into area
plugin.commands.description: Set the current note as an area with frontmatter-based review tracking. Migrates existing hashtag and mention syntax to frontmatter.
